## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔧 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Run command: `./vikrant ...`
2. Configure: '...'
3. See error: '...'

## ✅ Expected Behavior
A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## 📸 Screenshots/Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or error logs to help explain your problem.

```bash
# Paste error logs here
🖥️ Environment
OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 20.04, macOS 12, Windows 11]

Kernel: uname -a

Compiler: gcc --version

VIKRANT Version: [e.g., v1.0.0]

Network Setup: [e.g., 10GbE direct, VPN, localhost]

🔍 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here, such as:

Network topology

Hardware specifications

Other running applications

System load during testing

📊 Performance Impact
Expected throughput: [e.g., 1 GB/s]

Actual throughput: [e.g., 100 MB/s]

CPU Usage: [e.g., 50%]

Memory Usage: [e.g., 256 MB]

✅ Checklist
I have searched for similar issues

I have tested with the latest version

I have included all relevant logs

I have provided system information
